request: Role 3: native instruction authority/drift reviewer. DinoBrain OS unfinished improvement plan consensus review. Required files include MEMORY.md, docs/OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs/VERIFICATION.md, AGENTS.md, install/docs related to Claude/Codex hooks, and rg searches for native/AGENTS/CLAUDE/drift. gates.reason: The request or hook input was marked sensitive.

gates.reason: Every started OS task must be closed with finish_task.
